name: SIRL: --emit-rule-index produces the inverse index rule-id → list of sources defining/citing it
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-rule-index "$PWD/RULE-INDEX.yaml" >/dev/null 2>&1 && grep -E '^r1:' RULE-INDEX.yaml 1>&2 && grep -E '  - src-1' RULE-INDEX.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
mkdir -p tree && printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - {id: r1, name: r1, description: x, detector: x}
' > tree/a.yaml
